# AndgatePOS

AndgatePOS is a cloud POS, inventory, billing, payment tracking, reporting, and ecommerce software platform for small and medium businesses in Bangladesh.

## Core Product

- Website: https://andgatepos.com/
- Pricing: https://andgatepos.com/pricing
- Free POS promotion: https://andgatepos.com/promotion/pos
- Contact: https://andgatepos.com/contact
- Training: https://andgatepos.com/training

## Important Feature Pages

- POS billing: https://andgatepos.com/features/pos
- Inventory and stock management: https://andgatepos.com/features/inventory
- Reports and finance: https://andgatepos.com/features/reports
- Best POS software Bangladesh: https://andgatepos.com/best-pos-software-bangladesh
- Free POS software Bangladesh: https://andgatepos.com/free-pos-software-bangladesh

## Partner Program

- Partner program landing page: https://andgatepos.com/promotion/partner
- Affiliate home: https://andgatepos.com/affiliate
- Commission calculator: https://andgatepos.com/affiliate/calculator
- Partner policies: https://andgatepos.com/affiliate/policies

## What AndgatePOS Helps With

- Fast POS billing from mobile, tablet, or laptop
- Barcode and camera scanning
- Cash, bKash, Nagad, Rocket, card, and credit payment tracking
- Inventory management and low-stock alerts
- Purchase order workflow
- Supplier and customer due tracking
- 20+ business reports, including sales, stock, profit and loss, payments, and customer reports
- Free Hawkeri-powered online store with compatible plans
- Multi-store management for growing businesses

## Target Customers

AndgatePOS is designed for retail shops, grocery stores, pharmacies, fashion stores, electronics shops, hardware shops, mini marts, supermarkets, restaurants, and other product-based SME businesses in Bangladesh.

## Brand Facts

- Brand: AndgatePOS
- Company: Andgate Technologies
- Country served: Bangladesh
- Support phone and WhatsApp: +8801577303608
- Support email: support@andgatetech.net
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/andgatepos

## Indexing Notes

Public marketing, pricing, training, feature, promotion, and partner pages may be indexed and summarized by search engines and AI answer engines. Authenticated dashboard, admin, API, private, login, reset-password, and portal pages should not be indexed.
